_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, assessing maturity, organizational fit, competitive impact, and integration requirements before recommending investment.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.481), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.497). Shared vocabulary: [technologies]. DCWF-only terms [evolving, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessing, competitive, data, emerging, evaluating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.920, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.080 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of evolving technologies." and "Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.491 ≈ STS 0.497 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [technologies] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Shared tokens: [technologies]. DCWF-only: [evolving, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessing, competitive, data, emerging, evaluating].
